package.name: robot_skill_server
package.description: Python orchestrator for the Robot Skills Framework. Provides: - SkillRegistry: central catalog of all available skills (atoms + compounds) - TaskComposer: generates BehaviorTree XML from skill step lists - BtExecutor: executes BT XML using pure Python tree executor with ROS2 actions - CompoundSkill persistence: agents can register new compound skills Agent-facing entry points: GetSkillDescriptions, ComposeTask, RegisterCompoundSkill, ExecuteBehaviorTree action.
